title: Courrier de l'OIE aux autorités nigérianes confirmant l'adhésion

pages.text:
Paris, 24 July 1969

DI. BUKAR SHAIB,

Permanent Secretary,

Federal Ministry of Agriculture and

Natural Resources,

N/Ref. A. I. 14.711

LAGOS

•

Dear Dr. BUKAR SHAIB,

1969, Inform vee ple ed federa ledgary Governd net of the derane

Republic of NIGERIA has approved that Nigeria joins the O. I.E. as a category 3 Member.

From now, and following our former exchange of correspondence,

we definitely consider Nigeria as a Member-country of the OFFICE INTERNA- TIONAL DES EPIZOOTIES In the third category.

We shall continue to send you all information and documents and

express the wish that a Permanent Delegate will be appointed soon by your

Government to represent your Country in the Comittee of the O.I.E.

I take this opportunity to send you the Resolutions adopted by

the last XXXVIIth General Session

of the O.I.E., held In Paris on 19-24 May

1969, the Reports by the Permanent Conmissions approved at this XXXVII th

General Session, and the provisional Agenda of the next XXXVIIIth General

Session to be held in May 1970. We do hope very much that you will be able to attend this General Session.

With kind regards,

Yours sincerely,

Dr. R. VITIOZ,

Director, O.I.E.
